title: Venezuelan Skillet Beef
description: A flavorful and spicy dish from Venezuela, made with tender beef and a tangy sauce, served with a side of crispy skillet-fried potatoes.
instructions: Heat the skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the mighty, tangy, and venezuelan ingredients. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the beef is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
